headline: Sarawak Launches RM2 Billion State Pension Fund
context: Sarawak established State Pension Investment Fund in January 2026 with RM2 billion seed capital separate from federal EPF.

cards.big: Sarawak launches RM2 billion state pension fund separate from federal EPF
cards.sub: Fund aims to provide additional retirement income for 380,000 state workers

cards.big: State employees contribute 5% of salary matched by state government at 8%
cards.sub: Combined 13% exceeds EPF minimum targeting RM500 monthly pension supplement

cards.big: Fund invests 60% in Sarawak infrastructure bonds and 40% diversified portfolio
cards.sub: Strategy keeps investment returns circulating within the state economy

cards.big: Federal EPF expressed concern about potential fragmentation of pension system
cards.sub: 3 other states reportedly studying Sarawak model for possible replication

cards.big: State pension tests whether Sarawak financial autonomy can extend to retirement security
RM2 billion state pension fund — Sarawak is building parallel institutions where federal ones fall short.
